subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One of the world hath turned towards you and maketh mention of you. This is a bounty sanctified above all likeness and similitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلوم عالم بشما متوجه و شما را ذکر مینماید این فضلی است مقدس از مثل و مانند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
